Next.jsFull-Stack

About This Ranking

The SXSCLI Framework Rankings evaluate development frameworks across build performance, bundle optimization, developer ergonomics, documentation quality, community activity, and production deployment success rates. Our assessment combines technical benchmarks with developer satisfaction surveys.

Next.js maintains its top position in 2026 with Server Components maturation and improved performance. The rise of edge-first frameworks like Hono and content-first frameworks like Astro reflect the industry's shift toward performance-optimized architectures and specialized tools.

Independent rankings and awards for AI, developers, and technology.
